creator: handy@physics.montana.edu
text:
When I went to install gimp on my box, I noted that there was a new minor 
version out there, and thought to myself, "This can't be so hard..."

Nearly every patch file (there are a handful) got touched, and the PLIST has 
grown in size by about 500 lines. (!)  This was way, way too painful for the 
10 minutes I had planned on investing in it.  I've hardly played with it, 
but it would appear based on the PLIST alone there must be a giant vista of
new functionality.

I've also employed USE_BZIP2 here to shave the distfile size by 20%.
